implementation_summary: directMessageNotifications.ts required ZERO production change: its kind-4 (:85) and kind-1059 (:126) handlers already gate on the injected isAllowedSender callback strictly before rememberContact/incrementDirectMessage (a pre-existing seam from an earlier epic). This story's entire production diff is in DirectMessageNotificationsWatcher.tsx: (1) a new exported pure function isAllowedDmSenderComposite(peer, groups, knownPeers, blockedPeers, ownPubkeyHex) that assembles isAllowedDmSender(...) && !isBlockedPeer(...) at the call site per DD-8; (2) a blockedPeersRef initialized from loadBlockedPeers() and refreshed in a useEffect keyed on [groups, knownPeersRevision, blockedPeersRevision], mirroring the existing knownPeersRef pattern exactly; (3) the isAllowedSender closure passed into subscribeDirectMessageNotifications now calls isAllowedDmSenderComposite instead of isAllowedDmSender alone. The subscription-owning effect's own dependency array ([hydrated, pubkeyHex, privateKeyHex]) is untouched — no teardown/rebuild on block-revision change, satisfying AC-INBOUND-3's no-remount requirement via the ref pattern. AC-INBOUND-4 required no production change to dmProfile/receive.ts at all (verification-only) — passesDisclosureGate/isActiveNonArchivedContact already rejects archived peers from an earlier epic; a new regression test pins that guarantee under this epic's terminology.

verification.notes: Post-impl questions VQ-S2-013/014 record why zero production change to directMessageNotifications.ts is genuinely sufficient (not a shortcut), and why exporting a pure function from a .tsx watcher file for jsdom-free unit testing is a safe, precedented pattern (mirrors ProfileHealWatcher.tsx).

gated_acs.gate: S4 must call notifyBlockedPeersChanged in the BLOCK branch of handleArchiveToggle; re-verify at epic AC-closure.
S4 must call notifyBlockedPeersChanged in the UNBLOCK branch; re-verify at epic AC-closure.

accepted_residuals: Composite gate rehomed to blockedPeers.ts (post-review) to prevent a forked gate; S4 ContactChat imports it.
